# Sponsor Tiers

Budget Galaxy is free and open source. These tiers help sustain development, data updates, and new country coverage.

### Supporter — $5/month
You believe open budget data matters. Thank you.

### Data Enthusiast — $20/month
For journalists, researchers, and civic tech fans who use Budget Galaxy regularly.

### Institutional — $100/month
For organizations that rely on Budget Galaxy for research or reporting.
